_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Oxygen Saturation is a Sample (S) type per base-knowledge.md §3; value key `oxygen_saturation.percentage` (field name assumed). base-knowledge.md doesn't pin down whether Google's wire payload is already a 0...1 fraction or a 0...100 percentage; this fixture assumes a consumer-facing percentage (97, meaning 97%) since every SpO2 reading either platform shows a user is displayed that way -- SyncKit's TypeMapper converts 0...100 -> 0...1 explicitly (HealthKit's oxygenSaturation identifier requires a 0...1 fraction, base-knowledge.md §5). Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.oxygenSaturationPoint().
